Rung 5: split architecture. Universal Physics Encoder (3-component CNN, GroupNorm) + Regional Site Encoder (MLP on Vs30, CRUST1 Vp, sediment thickness, NEHRP one-hot, instrument one-hot) + Fusion head. Trained on California with event-grouped train/val and Ridgecrest/Coso geographic holdout. Physics branch takes only the waveform (hard rule #5).
